thoughts.subject: Li Mingzhu
thoughts.description: This is Li Mingzhu's plan for Monday February 16: wake up and complete the morning routine at 6:00 am, wake up and complete the morning routine at 6:00 am, open the tea house at 7:00 am and serve early morning customers—mostly laborers and

thoughts.subject: Li Mingzhu
thoughts.description: This is Li Mingzhu's plan for Sunday February 15: wake up and complete the morning routine at 6:00 am, wake up and complete the morning routine at 6:00 am, open the tea house at 7:00 am and serve early morning customers—mostly laborers and

thoughts.subject: self
thoughts.description: She takes pride in making tired travelers feel that her tea house is a dependable refuge.

thoughts.subject: self
thoughts.description: She worries that cakes may run short if the festival turnout is strong.

thoughts.subject: self
thoughts.description: She hopes An Lushan will bring word of foreign goods because novelty draws a paying crowd.

thoughts.subject: self
thoughts.description: She wants Chen Zian to visit tonight because educated customers attract more conversation and business.

thoughts.subject: self
thoughts.description: She expects scholars to recite poems if the tea house feels lively after sunset.

thoughts.subject: self
thoughts.description: She asked a lamp seller in West Market to reserve additional lanterns for tonight.

thoughts.subject: self
thoughts.description: Last year's Lantern Festival crowd overflowed the doorway and left her short on hot water.

thoughts.subject: self
thoughts.description: She likes to send an extra cake to regular customers who have had a difficult day.

thoughts.subject: self
thoughts.description: She has learned that examination candidates often bring the best gossip about officials and court moods.

thoughts.subject: self
thoughts.description: She keeps careful accounts because one bad week in the market can ruin a season.

thoughts.subject: self
thoughts.description: She knows which merchants bargain hard and which regulars quietly tip the servers.

thoughts.subject: self
thoughts.description: She inherited the tea house from her mother after years of helping behind the counter.
